opportunities.title: iOS Engineer - Mobile Platform
opportunities.description:
Join SumUp's Mobile Platform Squad as an iOS Engineer and become part of the foundation that powers our iOS app. With significant investment in our mobile products, we are empowering feature teams to deliver world-class experiences. You will contribute to building the robust infrastructure that enables iOS engineers across the company to operate with productivity and efficiency, directly shaping the future of mobile payments for millions of merchants.

Our engineering culture champions autonomy, collaboration, and innovation. Your work will have a mea
opportunities.llm_fit_note: ⚡ URGENT — [STRONG] Strong alignment with iOS expertise and infrastructure focus, plus remote-friendly startup-like environment. | wins: ios_shipping, fastlane_cicd, multi_app_monorepo

opportunities.title: [Hiring] Freelance SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist for Online Gaming Website (4–5+ Years Experience)
opportunities.description:
[Hiring] Freelance SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist for Online Gaming Website (4–5+ Years Experience)

We are looking for an experienced and proactive SEO & Digital Marketing Specialist from India to work long-term on our established online gaming website. Our website publishes thousands of browser-based games, including popular titles such as FNF Mods, Pokémon Games, Mario Games, Roblox Games, and many other trending categories. opportunities.llm_fit_note: [REJECT] Out of scope — role requires SEO/digital marketing, not frontend or full-stack development.

opportunities.description:
Noventra Group Europe works with selected brands, suppliers, and retail partners across the European market, with a focus on product sourcing, procurement support, and commercial retail collaboration.

 

As our partner brands continue to expand their presence across European retail channels, we are looking for a Remote Paid Media Specialist to support campaign coordination, audience research, paid advertising, and market development activities across Meta Ads and Google Ads.
